text: 宾夕法尼亚州 彼得·罗素议员
打扰了 Hey. Excuse me.
我是保罗·凯普拉 来见克里斯蒂娜 I'm Paul Capra. I'm here to see Christina.
这边请 凯普拉先生 她正在等你 Oh, right this way, Mr. Capra. She's expecting you.
保罗 你好 克里斯蒂娜 Paul. Hi. Hey, Christina.
真高兴见到你 我也是 It's good to see you. Yeah, you too.
吃点什么吗 Can I get you anything?
不用了 我在路上随便吃了点早饭 Nah. I grabbed some breakfast on the way down.
那好 请坐吧 好的 谢谢 Okay. Have a seat. All right. Thank you.
我请你来 I asked you down here
是因为我跟民主党议会竞选委员会 because I spoke to D triple C
和全国委员会讨论过了 and the D.N.C.
我们希望你来竞选彼得的职位 We'd like you to run for Peter's seat.
你或许知道 As you probably know,
竞选将在二月的第一周举行 the election's been set for the first week of February.
你们想让我参选 You want me to run?
你在小区的名望很高 With your stature in the community,
又有基层的组织经验 your grass roots organizing experience...
克里斯蒂娜 等等 Christina, hold on.
我知道这事很重大 I know it's a lot to consider.
这才一个月 It's only been a month.
我们还得继续执政 保罗 Well, we still have to govern, Paul.
我以为你叫我来 I thought you asked me down here
是要跟我聊聊之类的 because you wanted to talk or something.
是啊 聊竞选的事 I do. About the election.
我是说聊彼得的事 I mean about Peter.
你怎么没来参加葬礼 How come you didn't go to the funeral?
我做不到 I couldn't.
你最近怎么样 How you been holding up?
我还好 维持机关正常运转不太容易 I'm all right. It's been hard keeping the office on track.
上帝啊 去他的机关 Jesus. Screw the office.
你自己还好吗 What about you?
你不用硬撑着 克里斯蒂娜 You're allowed to grieve, Christina.
保罗 Paul...
有60万人指望着我们呢 there are 600,000 people counting on us.
我不能因为个人感情影响工作 I can't let my feelings get in the way of that.
可以听我把竞选的事说完了吗 Will you hear me out about running for Peter's seat?

纸牌屋
你的审查结果相当不错 Well, you've passed the vetting process with flying colors.
还有什么要补充的吗 没有 先生 Is there anything we might have missed? No, sir.
跟我讲讲 Tell me about your
你担任监督改革委员会主席的经历吧 experience as the chair of the oversight reform committee.
我获益良多 It's been very rewarding.
你遇到的最严峻的挑战是什么 What are the biggest challenges you've had to face?
党派斗争 Partisanship.
监管435个自大狂 Well, I suppose a room filled with 435 big egos
美国众议院有435个席位
肯定不是件容易的事 isn't the most hospitable place for oversight.
你想不想成为副总统 塔比瑟 Do you want to be Vice President, Tabitha?
那将是无上荣幸 先生 It would be a great honor, sir.
我们会再联系你 We'll be in touch.
就这样吗 That's all?
先这样吧 谢谢您 总统先生 For the time being. Thank you, Mr. President.
我们得划掉她 We have to cross her off.
同意 她能把瘾君子讲睡着 I agree. She could put a crack addict to sleep.
那她怎么会出现在这张名单上 Then what is she doing on the goddamn list?
塔比瑟是位很有才干的立法者 Tabitha's a very gifted legislator.
我不需要那些理论上可行的人 I don't want people who make sense on paper.
起码给我一个可选的人 I need at least one viable option.
列这张名单的人是你们 The two of you created this list and
把名字一个个划掉的也是你们 have proceeded to cross off every name you've put on it.
这只是初次筛选 先生 It's just a first pass, sir.
我们还需要时间去审查所有… We need time to fully vet all...
吉姆肯定会拿下宾州州长 Jim is gonna win this thing in Pennsylvania,
而我们在继任者提名问题上 and we're no closer to naming his replacement
却原地踏步了一个月 than we were a month ago.
我们会再尽力找找 Let us take another crack at it
再找几个值得考虑的人 and give you a few more names to consider.
我只需要一个让人满意的 I just want one name.
我们会在明早前答复您 We'll have something for you by tomorrow morning.
谢谢您 总统先生 Thank you, Mr. President.
他现在什么都会同意的 He's ready to say yes to anything.
想成功的话 我觉得你最好别在场 Yeah, for this to work, I don't think you can be there.
起码我最初提出的时候别在 同意 Not when I first mention it. I agree.
你明早报告时提出来 You bring it up in your morning brief,
我到的时候 再故作惊讶 and when I show up, I'll act surprised.
如果他愿意考虑… Assuming he's open to the idea...
明天我们只要给他灌输这个想法就行 Look, all we have to do tomorrow is plant the notion in his head.
你肯定能说服他的 I'm sure you'll be persuasive.
喂 凯普拉先生吗 Hello? Mr. Capra?
是我 你是谁 Yeah. Who's this?
我是头条网的简宁·斯克斯基 Janine Skorsky from Slugline.
我报道罗素议员去世时曾采访过你 We spoke when I wrote the piece about Congressman Russo's passing.
我不会再接受关于彼得的采访了 I'm done giving interviews about Peter, okay?
他有很多困扰 就这样 He was a troubled guy. End of story.
我不是要问他去世的事 This is not about his death.
我打电话是因为 I'm calling you because
有来自民主党议会竞选委员会的消息称 my sources at the D Triple C are telling me
你会竞选他的职位 that you might be running for his seat.
这事我不予回答 I'm not talking about that.
但你今早确实跟 But you did have a meeting
克里斯蒂娜·盖拉格见过面了吧 this morning with Christina Gallagher, correct?
我在开车 真的不能多聊 I'm driving right now. I really shouldn't be on the phone.
如果你确实要参选 我想知道 If you do run, I would like to know
你在关闭费城船厂一事中 about your involvement in the closing of
扮演了怎样的角色 the Philadelphia shipyard.
那是华盛顿的决定 That decision was made in Washington.
没有询问协会的意见 The association wasn't consulted.
抱歉 这我很难相信 Forgive me. I find that hard to believe.
我读过所有军事基地整合委员会的笔录 I read all of the transcripts from the BRAC Commission.
罗素议员没有给出任何证词 Congressman Russo didn't give any testimony.
那你的意思是 So are you saying that
他没和你们商讨就… he didn't consult with you once before you...
是别人逼他的 好吗 政治手段 Somebody was strong-arming him, okay? It was politics.
你知道是谁给他施的压吗 Do you know who would've pressured him?
不知道 他说是位高权重的人 Look, I don't know. He just said people up the food chain.
他有具体说明… Did he say anything more specific about...
车太多了 我得挂了 You know what? There's traffic. I gotta go.
凯普拉先生 我想… Mr. Capra, I would...
我要准备应对媒体吗 Should I be prepared to do press?
如果他听劝的话 If he's amenable.
你觉得我们的胜算多大 What do you think our chances are?
非要说的话 超过一半吧 Better than 50-50, if I had to say.
马修斯胜选前我们不会宣布的 We won't announce until after Matthews wins, though.
我不想承认 但我很紧张 I hate to admit it, but I'm nervous.
我也是 So am I.
只是上次我们遇到这种情况… It's just the last time, we found ourselves...
我也是怕这个 That's my fear too.
好吧 不论怎样 打给我 All right. You call me, either way.
九个小时内给你电话 In no more than nine hours.
琳达在里面太久了 Linda's been in there far too long.
如果说服总统要这么久 If the President takes this much convincing,
那绝不是好事 我感觉得到 it doesn't bode well. I can feel it...
门那边他的犹豫 his hesitation on the other side of that door.
虽说知道结果前 I know it's pointless to worry
急也没有用 until I know what cards I'm holding.
或许他是被什么打断… Perhaps he just got interrupted by some...
他想任命雷蒙德·塔斯克 He wants to tap Raymond Tusk.
什么 他觉得这想法很大胆 What? He thinks it's a bold idea.
是愚蠢才对 他从没任过公职 It's an idiotic idea. The man's never held public office.
这是总统喜欢他的地方之一 That's one of the things the President said he likes about him.
总统想在经济萧条时 The President wants to nominate
任命一个亿万富翁吗 a multibillionaire in a struggling economy?
半个国家都会与他对立 He'll alienate half the country.
这正是我说的 Which is exactly what I said,
但他说得很清楚 but he made it very clear
他不想让我和他争辩 he does not want me to fight him on this.
那你根本没说到我 都没有机会 So you didn't mention me at all? I never had the chance.
我能插话前他就决定好了 His mind was made up before I could say a word.
我们得让他改变主意 Well, we have to unmake it.
你可以试试 但如果你说什么 Well, you can try, but if you do,
我猜他只会干脆不许你再插手 my guess is he's gonna cut you out of the process altogether.
他看起来非常坚定 He seemed adamant.
我们该进去了 We should go in there.
总统先生 早上好 弗兰克 Mr. President. Morning, Frank.
能让我们单独谈一会儿吗 琳达 Will you give us a few minutes, Linda?
当然 Of course.
琳达告诉你了吗 Linda fill you in?
我觉得雷蒙德·塔斯克 I think Raymond Tusk
是个大胆 新奇的选择 is an exciting, bold idea.
很高兴你赞同我 琳达可不这么想 Well, I'm glad you agree. Linda didn't think so.
他是有实力的商人 聪明 但很踏实 He's a proven businessman. Brilliant, but down-to-earth.
你和他有私交吗 Do you know him personally?
我们在一次募捐会上有点头之交 I met him briefly once at a fund-raiser.
昨晚打给他时 Last night when I called him
我们才第一次深谈 was the first time we had a meaningful conversation.
他愿意考虑吗 Did he seem open to the idea?
我感觉他很不情愿 I sensed a good deal of reluctance.
他要几天时间来想想 He wanted a few days to consider.
很好 这样就有时间审查他了 Well, good. That gives us time to start vetting him.
他没问题 我去年就审查过他 He's clean. I had him vetted last year
当时想任命他为财政部长 when I was considering him for Secretary of the Treasury.
他有说为什么不情愿吗 And did he say why he's reluctant?
没说原因 只说要好好想想 No. Didn't give a reason. Just wanted to mull it over.
我想派人去圣刘易斯和他当面谈 I want to send someone to St. Louis to speak to him in person,
让他接受任命 convince him to accept the nomination.
你有合适人选吗 And who are you thinking about?
我想叫琳达 但她这边工作太忙了 I'd send Linda, but there's so much work for her to do here,
而且她有时说话比较难听 and, well, she can be abrasive at times.
是啊 她是比较强势 Yeah, she can be a bit tough.
我要找个比较庄重的 I want someone with gravitas.
博奇可以考虑 Birch is a possibility,
但他并不总是站在我们这边 but he's not always been our strongest ally.
我看这种事不能托付给鲍勃 I'm not sure I would trust Bob with something like this.
我很乐意去 先生 I would be happy to go myself, sir.
我会耐心规劝 给他应得的尊重 I can use a light touch and give him the respect he deserves.
很好 我会通知他的手下你要过去 Good. I'll let his people know you're coming.
谢谢您 总统先生 谢谢你 弗兰克 Thank you, Mr. President. Thank you, Frank.
说吧 弗兰西斯 Tell me, Francis.
幸好我们做了周全的准备 It's good we were prepared for anything.
我今晚得飞去圣刘易斯 I have to fly to St. Louis tonight.
"是别人逼他的" "Somebody was strong-arming him."
我问他是谁时 他原话是 and when I asked him who, he said, quote,
"位高权重的人" 这可是华盛顿 "People up the food chain." It's Washington.
议员受到逼迫是常事 Congressmen get strong-armed all the time.
我觉得是弗兰克·安德伍德 My gut says it was Frank Underwood.
在造船厂倒闭前 他和罗素没任何往来 He had nothing to do with Russo before the shipyard closing,
然后突然就支持他了 and then suddenly he's propping him up?
那不意味着他… That doesn't mean he was...
我们别再兜圈子了 佐伊 Let's cut the bullshit once and for all, Zoe.
我知道是他给你提供信息 I know he's been feeding you your stories.
我不想害你 I don't want to screw you over,
但我会继续深入调查 but I'm not gonna stop digging on this.
我不会承认他是我的联络人 I won't say he was a source.
但你们确实认识 But you do know each other.
给我看你的笔记 我去和他谈 Show me your notes, and I'll talk to him.
这是和凯普拉通话的笔记 These are the notes from the Capra call.
这是军事基地整合委员会听证会的笔录 And these are the transcripts from the BRAC hearing.
他们讨论到费城造船厂时 When they got to the Philadelphia shipyard,
罗素什么都没说 Russo doesn't say anything.
没关系 That's fine.
我会把两个都拖进那个活页夹里 Yeah, I would just put both of them in that file.
克莱尔 我刚接到桑科公关部的电话 Claire, I just got a call from the P.R. office at Sancorp
他们想派摄制组来 saying they wanted to send a film crew
拍我们在博茨瓦纳的滤水项目 to take footage of our filtration project in Botswana.
对 他们要用它做宣传片 Right. They're just using that for promotional material.
桑科反对我们的流域法案 Sancorp fought us on the watershed bill.
他们帮我们把滤水器运出了南苏丹 They helped us get the filters out of South Sudan.
那不是国务院做的吗 I thought that was the State Department.
不 你记得雷米·丹顿吗 No. You remember Remy Danton?
你刚来这里工作时曾在办公室见过他 You met him in your office right after you started working here.
那个说客 我找他帮的忙 The lobbyist. I asked him for his help.
现在只是投桃报李 就这样 We're just returning the favor, that's all.
克莱尔 他们的立场和我们完全相反 Claire, they're against everything we stand for.
没关系的 他们会把影片 It's harmless. They'll send the video
发给几个投资者 做些宣传 to a few of their investors and make some commercials.
这让我很不舒服 This makes me very uncomfortable... the idea...
他们会派摄制组来 吉莉安 They are sending the film crew, Gillian,
请好好配合他们 so please work with them on that.
我的同事在调查彼得·罗素 One of my colleagues is looking into Peter Russo.
认为他关闭造船厂是受你所迫 The assumption is you strong-armed him into closing the shipyard.
你同事从哪得来的消息 Where does your colleague get their information?
我不知道 I don't know.
国防部预算的分配一直是自由竞争 Allocating the D.O.D. budget is always a free-for-all.
你对他施过压吗 Did you pressure him?
船厂早日关闭 There were certain people that were gonna benefit
确实对某些人有好处 from the base closing sooner rather than later.
我没有逼迫彼得 I didn't strong-arm Peter.
我只是建议他化腐朽为优势 I advised him to trade in a losing hand for a winning one.
他得到什么优势了 How did he stand to win?
化敌为友 He made allies out of enemies.
这在国会非常可贵 That's a very valuable thing in Congress.
真希望我能给你更有料的信息 I wish I could give you something juicier,
但造船厂的关闭只是寻常的政治手腕 but the shipyard closing was just politics as usual.
我猜那个同事是斯克斯基女士 I assume your colleague is Ms. Skorsky.
她知道我们的关系吗 Does she know we're talking?
当然不知道 No. Of course not.
保持联络 Be in touch.

他掌控的公司 政治贡献 the companies he controls, political contributions.
《绅士季刊》的文章 《乡野亿万富翁》 A GQ article entitled "Backwoods billionaire"
说的是他在中西部的低调生活 老天 is about his humble midwestern lifestyle. Jesus.
还有一份财务状况的披露要求 There's also a copy of the financial disclosure requirements
和保密委托的细节 and details of the blind trust.
我觉得你该从委托入手 I think the trust is where you want to focus.
这会是琳达的主意吗 Could Linda be behind all this?
什么目的 To what end?
调你出城几天 To get you out of town for a few days
只剩他们俩继续找人选 while they continue the search without your interference.
总统没理由不信任我 The President has no reason to mistrust me.
除非琳达告诉他你想当副总统 Unless Linda told him you want the Vice Presidency.
不 她陷得太深了 No. She's in way too deep.
国务卿提名的事我们就失误了 We misjudged her on the Secretary of State nomination.
那不一样 那次是攻我不备 That was different. She blindsided me.
现在她知道我眼观六路呢 Now she knows my eyes are wide open.
您要私人行装还是商务行头 Do you want the Gaffney bag or regular business?
商务行头 塔斯克愿穿便服是他的事 Regular business. Tusk can dress down if he wants to,
但我代表的是白宫 but I'm representing the White House.
让沃尔特·道尔查塔斯克 Oh, and get Walter Doyle onto Tusk.
看看能挖到什么料 Let's see if we can dig up anything.
我这就打给他 I'll call him right now.
我离开这段时间留意简宁·斯克斯基 And keep your eye on Janine Skorsky while I'm away.
她在打听罗素的事 She's been prying into Russo.
她知道什么 What does she know?
她的问题切中要害 She knows the right questions to ask.
要确保她得不到正确答案 I want to make sure she doesn't get the right answers.
我知道了 I'm on it.
麦喀顿 McCuddin.
麦喀顿 McCuddin.
你说什么 What was that?
麦喀顿空军基地 McCuddin Air Force Base.
军事基地整合委员会于4月12日举行听证 BRAC hearing. Was there on April 12th.
不到一周后戴维·拉斯姆森离职 David Rasmussen stepped down less than a week later.
乌麦克接替了他 很可能… Womack takes his place. So maybe...
等下 慢点 Wait. Slow down.
麦喀顿在他的选区 McCudden is in his district.
是造船厂那事吗 Is that the shipyard thing?
简宁 给我回电 Janine, call me back.
我想是乌麦克给罗素施了压 I think it was Womack who pressured Russo.
罗素可能只是想卖个人情 Russo was probably just earning a favor
回头再找回来 he could cash in later.
我随时都在 I'm around.
你有没有为阻止她报道而跟她争过 Did you ever have to fight her to kill a story?
简宁吗 Janine?
对 她还是你手下的时候 Yeah. When she worked for you.
只有在我知道她不对的时候 Only when I knew she was wrong.
她想写一篇阴谋论的报道 She's trying to draw up this whole conspiracy thing
涉及罗素 弗兰克·安德伍德 with Russo and Frank Underwood
还有造船厂关闭的事 and the whole shipyard closing.
我觉得是她错了 But I'm pretty sure she's wrong.
觉得不代表确定 不 我确定 Pretty sure isn't the same as certain. No. I am certain.
你怎么知道 我有联络人 How do you know? I have sources.
安德伍德吗 不是 Underwood? No.
算了 我再想想 No. Never mind. I'll figure it out.
塔斯克太太 叫我珍就好了 Mrs. Tusk? Jean, please.
你一定是弗兰克了 快请进 You must be Frank. Come in.
很高兴见到你 So nice to meet you.
客房在这边 The guest room is this way.
邀请我来住 真是太贴心了 It is very kind of you to have invited me to stay here.
我们这儿有舒适的床 Why waste the taxpayers' money on a hotel
何必浪费纳税人的钱住宾馆呢 when we have a perfectly good bed?
纳税人和我都十分感激 Well, both they and I are very grateful.
抱歉雷蒙德睡下了不能来迎你 I'm sorry Raymond isn't awake to greet you.
他睡觉… 我知道他习惯早起 He goes to bed at... I know he's an early riser.
我理解的 I understand.
你要我早上敲门叫你吗 Would you like a wake-up knock?
不用了 我手机上有闹铃 No. I have an alarm on my phone.
晚安 非常感谢 Sleep tight. Thank you so much.
我想问早安 但现在是大半夜 I would say good morning, but it's the middle of the night.
见到你很高兴 我也是 It's a pleasure to meet you. And you too.
我太吵了吗 Was I making too much noise?
不是 我闻到了培根香 No. I smelled bacon.
给你 Here.
咖啡还是酒 Coffee? Booze?
凌晨两点 任你选 2:00 a.m., you can go either way.
来杯水就好 Just water for now.
过滤过的水 你妻子会喜欢的 It's filtered. Your wife would approve.
你之前来过圣刘易斯吗 You ever been to St. Louis before?
只来过机场 Just the airport.
你有什么看法 What do you think so far?
我只看到了你家一带 Well, I've only seen your neighborhood
还有州际公路沿途的风景 and whatever I could see out the window on the interstate.
可以了 看起来都差不多 Good enough. It's all pretty much the same.
